mapper.select:
SELECT examine_type AS "type" FROM "spl_business_examine" WHERE is_complete = '0'
AND audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
AND id!=like CONCAT('%', #{examinID}, '%')
LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id AS "user_id" FROM spl_sp_user
SELECT a."examine_id" examinID, a."ope_type" opeType FROM "spl_workitem_his" a WHERE a."work_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{workId}, '%')
SELECT a."examine_id" examinID, a."ope_type" opeType FROM "spl_workitem_his" a WHERE a."examine_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{examineId}, '%') AND a."ope_user_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(audit_model_number) AS num FROM "audit_elements_info" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')

SELECT a."dock_people" AS dockPeople, a."dock_deputy" AS defExamUserDept, a."dock_dept" AS dockDepartment FROM "spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT audit_model_name AS modelName FROM audit_elements_info WHERE 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT audit_model_name AS modelName FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT id AS cgId, examine_id AS examineId FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT loginId AS userId, loginName AS userName FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_userinfos WHERE deputyAccountNumber = like CONCAT('%', #{deputyAccountNumber}, '%') LIMIT 1

SELECT b."loginId" AS userId, b."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputyAccountNumber, b."userName" AS userName, b.busiUnitCode AS busiUnitCode FROM "spl_model_type" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" b ON a.def_exam_userDept = b."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')

SELECT b."loginId" AS userId, b."deputyAccountNumber" AS deputyAccountNumber, b."userName" AS userName, b.busiUnitCode AS busiUnitCode FROM "spl_model_type" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" b ON a."def2_exam_userdepy" = b."deputyAccountNumber" WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT * FROM "spl_model_type" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "spl_model_type" (id, audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, type_of_information, dock_people, dock_deputy, dock_dept, write_time, audit_model_type, model_owner, model_owner_depy, continue_to_enter, creat_time, online_type) VALUES (like CONCAT('%', #{examinID}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{typeOfInformation}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{dockDeputy}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{deckDept}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{writeTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelType}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwner}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwnerDepy}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{continueToEnter}, '%'),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,like CONCAT('%', #{onlineType}, '%'))
mapper.update:
UPDATE "spl_model_type" SET creat_time=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
,audit_model_type = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelType}, '%')
,dock_deputy = like CONCAT('%', #{dockDeputy}, '%')
,dock_people = like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
,dock_dept = like CONCAT('%', #{deckDept}, '%')
,write_time = like CONCAT('%', #{writeTime}, '%')
,type_of_information = like CONCAT('%', #{typeOfInformation}, '%')
,continue_to_enter = like CONCAT('%', #{continueToEnter}, '%')
,def_exam_user = like CONCAT('%', #{defExamUser}, '%')
,def_exam_userDept = like CONCAT('%', #{defExamUserDept}, '%')
,def2_exam_user = like CONCAT('%', #{def2ExamUser}, '%')
,def2_exam_userdepy = like CONCAT('%', #{def2ExamUserDepy}, '%')
,share_user = like CONCAT('%', #{shareUser}, '%')
,share_user_depy = like CONCAT('%', #{shareUserDepy}, '%')
,online_type = like CONCAT('%', #{onlineType}, '%')
,model_owner = like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwner}, '%')
,model_owner_depy = like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwnerDepy}, '%')
WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO "spl_business_examine"
id, process_instId, activity_instId, workItem_Id, audit_model_number, submit_user, sub_depy, submit_time, submit_remarks, examine_user, exam_depy, examine_dept, examine_time, examine_type, examine_result, examine_message_id, is_complete, examine_category, create_time
like CONCAT('%', #{id}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{process_instId}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{activity_instId}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{workItem_Id}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{audit_model_number}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{submit_user}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{sub_depy}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{submit_time}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{submit_remarks}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_user}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{exam_depy}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_dept}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_time}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_type}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_result}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_message_id}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{is_complete}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_category}, '%'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update:
UPDATE "spl_business_examine"
,audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{audit_model_number}, '%')
,submit_user = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_user}, '%') ,sub_depy = like CONCAT('%', #{sub_depy}, '%') ,submit_time = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_time}, '%') ,submit_remarks = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_remarks}, '%') ,examine_type = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_type}, '%') ,submit_user = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_user}, '%') ,submit_time = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_time}, '%') ,submit_remarks = like CONCAT('%', #{submit_remarks}, '%') ,exam_depy=like CONCAT('%', #{exam_depy}, '%') ,examine_user = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_user}, '%') ,process_instId = like CONCAT('%', #{process_instId}, '%') ,workItem_Id = like CONCAT('%', #{workItem_Id}, '%') ,examine_dept = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_dept}, '%') ,examine_time = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_time}, '%') ,examine_result = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_result}, '%') ,examine_message_id = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_message_id}, '%')
,is_complete = like CONCAT('%', #{is_complete}, '%') ,now_category = like CONCAT('%', #{now_category}, '%') ,examine_category = like CONCAT('%', #{examine_category}, '%')
where id=like CONCAT('%', #{id}, '%')
UPDATE "spl_business_dy" a SET a."is_del" = '0' WHERE a."pro_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{dyProId}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "spl_message_bf" VALUES (like CONCAT('%', #{id}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_type}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{audit_model_number}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_message}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{examine_node}, '%'))
mapper.select: SELECT audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name FROM audit_elements_info WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT user_name AS "value", user_name AS "label" FROM "spl_sp_user" WHERE "default" = '1'
SELECT COALESCE(is_syn, 0) AS isSyn FROM "audit_elements_info" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT * FROM "audit_elements_info" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_elements_info SET is_online = '1' WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
UPDATE "spl_model_type" SET examine_id =like CONCAT('%', #{examinID}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE "spl_mainten_db" SET is_tx='0' WHERE model_no = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM "spl_mainten_db" WHERE model_no = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM spl_business_examine WHERE id = like CONCAT('%', #{examinID}, '%')

SELECT a.deputyAccountNumber AS deputyAccountNumber, b.busiUnitCode AS busiUnitCode, b.provinceName AS provinceName, b.deptname AS deptname, a.userId AS userId, a."userName" AS userName FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" b ON a."busiUnitCode" = b."busiUnitCode" WHERE 1 = 1 AND userName = like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%') LIMIT 1
SELECT "id" AS id FROM "spl_model_type" where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS a FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')

SELECT id AS examinID, submit_remarks AS remarks, audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber FROM "spl_business_examine" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND is_complete = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE "spl_model_type" SET
def2_exam_user = like CONCAT('%', #{def2ExamUser}, '%'),
def2_exam_userdepy = like CONCAT('%', #{def2ExamUserDepy}, '%'),
def_exam_user = like CONCAT('%', #{defExamUser}, '%'), def_exam_userDept=like CONCAT('%', #{defExamUserDept}, '%') WHERE 1=1
and audit_model_number in
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT type_of_information AS "step", audit_model_type AS type FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT audit_model_type AS modelTypeExam FROM "spl_model_type" WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT GROUP_(c.name) data_content_description FROM audit_elements_data_support_v2 c WHERE 1 = 1 AND c.audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND c.isdel = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "xbpj_operation_flow" (business1, business2, source, business_area, "field", AuditpointNo, AuditpointName, ModelNo, ModelName, model_type, bonc_audit_point, source_domain, model_online_time, audit_scope, model_url, model_OnlineJi_Time, model_logic, home_system, data_source, datastart_time, modelrunning_frequency, is_cured, "order", cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, belong_cmwa, version, allow_down) VALUE ( like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{source}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{businessArea}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNo}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_type}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{source_domain}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{model_online_time}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{audit_scope}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_url}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_OnlineJi_Time}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_logic}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{home_system}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{data_source}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{datastart_time}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelrunning_frequency}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{is_cured}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{order}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%') )
mapper.select: SELECT a.deputyAccountNumber AS deputyAccountNumber, b.busiUnitCode AS busiUnitCode, b.provinceName AS provinceName, b.deptname AS deptname, a.userId AS userId, a."userName" AS userName, c.login_id as loginId FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_userinfos" a LEFT JOIN hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" b ON a."busiUnitCode" = b."busiUnitCode" LEFT JOIN hpmgr.bonc_user_role_info as c on a.deputyAccountNumber = c.deputy_accountNumber WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.deputyAccountNumber = like CONCAT('%', #{deputyAccountNumber}, '%') ORDER BY orgLevel DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num FROM "audit_show_qx" a WHERE a."userDepy" = like CONCAT('%', #{defExamUser}, '%')
mapper.insert:
insert into spl_workitem_his
work_id,
examine_id,
role_name,
dept_name,
ope_type,
ope_user,
ope_user_id,
ope_time,
next_user_id,
next_user,
reoly_type,
reoly_remarks,
like CONCAT('%', #{workId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{examineId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{opeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{opeUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{opeUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{opeTime}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{nextUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{nextUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{reolyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{reolyRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
mapper.update:
update spl_workitem_his
reoly_type = like CONCAT('%', #{reolyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
reoly_remarks = like CONCAT('%', #{reolyRemarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
where work_id = like CONCAT('%', #{workId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
